# Peculiar Youth & Children Ministry

> A youth and children's church in Kasoa, Ghana helping young people (ages 10–19) discover Jesus, build real friendships, and live out their purpose.

We publish sermons, Bible studies, articles, devotional blog posts, and scripture-inspired digital artworks, and host events for the next generation.

## Pages
- [Home](/): Overview of the ministry, latest sermon, upcoming events, verse of the day.
- [About](/about): Who we are, what we believe, and our leadership team.
- [Contact](/contact): Address, phone, email, service times, and location in Kasoa, Ghana.
- [Give](/give): Support the ministry via card, mobile money, Apple Pay, or bank transfer.
- [Events](/events): Upcoming camps, game nights, outreaches, and services.
- [Sermons](/sermons): Weekly sermon library with video, audio, and PDF notes.
- [Blog](/blog): Stories, devotionals, and announcements.
- [Bible Studies](/bible-studies): Lesson notes and group discussion guides.
- [Articles](/articles): Long-form articles and columns.
- [Digital Artworks](/artworks): Scripture-inspired posters and wallpapers.
- [Newsletter](/newsletter): Subscribe to our updates.
